query:
SELECT 
  d.id,
  d.clientId,
  c.name AS clientName,
  d.date,
  d.scheduledStart,
  d.scheduledEnd,
  d.status,
  d.breakHours
FROM demands d
LEFT JOIN clients c ON d.clientId = c.id
WHERE d.id = 390142;
